items.description:
The Single-Node Bottleneck

In the early days of a B2B SaaS platform at Smart Tech Devs, a single database instance handles everything. When a user submits an invoice, the database writes the row. When an executive loads their dashboard, the database runs a complex GROUP BY r

items.title: The Best Developers I Know Have Terrible Resumes
items.description:
Your GitHub Is Your Real Resume

Most developer resumes look exactly the same.

Same skills.

Same buzzwords.

Same claims.

  • "5+ years experience"
  • "Expert in React"
  • "Senior Full Stack Developer"

But very little proof.
